generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) for the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderAxis1
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderAxis1
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data of motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values from motor current and other parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModeling
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell model for digital twin assets"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for managing digital twin assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840D : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for machine control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for displaying model outputs and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction parameters for robot control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of model outputs and sensor data in dashboard for enhancing motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction parameters to improve robot control algorithms"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced motion accuracy by reducing inaccuracies caused by joint friction"
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent, MABIMAX100Axis1, MotorEncoderAxis1, GearboxEncoderAxis1, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing via MQTT for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose-driven digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models for friction, live sensor data via MQTT, and AAS for traceability, visualized in a dashboard to enhance understanding of joint friction in the robot's first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with continuous updates during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference values, with friction models continuously updated based on live data to reduce inaccuracies up to 30% caused by joint friction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for digital representation, SysML for modeling, and MQTT for communication."
]
